name: Pork Stew with Corn Bread Topping
recipeIngredient: Squash; Small, 1 small butternut or acorn squash, pared and cut into 1/2-inch cubes (about 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into 1-inch cubes.
2. Cut squash into 1/2-inch cubes (about 1 cup).
3. In a large pot, sauté onion and garlic until fragrant.
4. Add pork, chorizo, broth, basil, cilantro, chiles, corn, tomato, and squash to the pot.
5. Simmer stew for about 30 minutes or until pork is tender.
6. Prepare cornbread topping by mixing all ingredients in a bowl.
7. Pour the cornbread mixture on top of the stew before serving.
8. Garnish with Fresh Tomato Salsa from recipe Sowest1.
